readings.summary: The Lord will gather all people to see his glory.

readings.citation:
Ps 117:1, 2, R. Mk 16:15
Go out to all the world and tell the Good News.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 117:1, 2, R. Mk 16:15
Go out to all the world and tell the Good News.

readings.summary: The Lord disciplines those he loves.

I am the way, the truth and the life, says the Lord;
no one comes to the Father, except through me.
It is difficult to enter the kingdom of God.

antiphons.citation: Communion Antiphon • Option II |  Cf. Jn 6:54
antiphons.text:
Whoever eats my flesh and drinks my blood
has eternal life, says the Lord,
and I will raise him up on the last day.
